hero.text: Believe in the magic of new beginnings.
hero.author: Anonymous

aries.general: Today is a day for new beginnings and taking bold steps towards your goals.
aries.love: Romantic gestures could bring a spark in your relationship today.
aries.career: Your ambition will shine through in all professional endeavors today.

taurus.general: Embrace the tranquility around you; peace will help you regain focus.
taurus.love: A small misunderstanding can be resolved with open communication.
taurus.career: Creative solutions will lead to progress in your projects.

gemini.general: Flexibility will be key in navigating the day's challenges.
gemini.love: There may be a need for more intimacy with your partner.
gemini.career: Collaboration with colleagues will enhance productivity.

cancer.general: Emotional insights gained today will guide your decisions.
cancer.love: Nurturing moments with loved ones will bring joy.
cancer.career: Trust your intuition when making strategic choices.

leo.general: Your confidence will draw others to you; shine bright!
leo.love: Romance is in the air; plan something special.
leo.career: Leadership opportunities will present themselves; be ready.

virgo.general: Attention to detail will help you achieve remarkable results today.
virgo.love: A thoughtful gesture will deepen your relationship.
virgo.career: Analytical skills will help you solve complex problems.

libra.general: Seek balance in your emotions for a smoother day.
libra.love: Sharing your thoughts will strengthen your bond with a partner.
libra.career: Networking will open new avenues for your career.

scorpio.general: Use your passion to fuel your ambitions today.
scorpio.love: Intense emotions can lead to deeper understanding with your partner.
scorpio.career: Be bold in sharing your ideas; they could lead to success.

sagittarius.general: Adventure awaits; embrace spontaneity in your day.
sagittarius.love: A surprise could rekindle the romance in your relationship.
sagittarius.career: Innovation will bring positive changes in your work environment.

capricorn.general: Your determination will help you overcome obstacles today.
capricorn.love: Take time to appreciate the small moments in your relationship.
capricorn.career: Hard work will pay off; stay focused on your goals.

aquarius.general: Think outside the box to solve pressing issues today.
aquarius.love: Communication will clear up any misunderstandings in love.
aquarius.career: Your innovative ideas will impress those around you.

pisces.general: Creativity will flow; take time to express your artistic side.
pisces.love: Connecting on a deeper level is possible today.
pisces.career: Your empathy will make you a valued team member.

professional.text: Success is the sum of small efforts repeated day in and day out.
professional.author: Robert Collier

professional.text: Opportunities don't happen, you create them.
professional.author: Chris Grosser

professional.text: Dream big and dare to fail.
professional.author: Norman Vaughan

professional.text: Your work is going to fill a large part of your life, and the only way to be truly satisfied is to do what you believe is great work.
professional.author: Steve Jobs

professional.text: The future belongs to those who believe in the beauty of their dreams.
professional.author: Eleanor Roosevelt

professional.text: Don't watch the clock; do what it does. Keep going.
professional.author: Sam Levenson

motivation.text: The only limit to our realization of tomorrow will be our doubts of today.
motivation.author: Franklin D. Roosevelt

motivation.text: Do not wait to strike till the iron is hot, but make it hot by striking.
motivation.author: William Butler Yeats

motivation.text: The only way to achieve the impossible is to believe it is possible.
motivation.author: Charles Kingsleigh

motivation.text: I am not a product of my circumstances. I am a product of my decisions.
motivation.author: Stephen R. Covey

motivation.text: It does not matter how slowly you go as long as you do not stop.
motivation.author: Confucius

motivation.text: Success is not final, failure is not fatal: It is the courage to continue that counts.
motivation.author: Winston Churchill

captions.text: Chasing dreams one step at a time.
Living for today, hoping for tomorrow.
Great things never came from comfort zones.
Adventure is out there; go find it!
Turning dreams into reality, one day at a time.

tech.text: Technology is best when it brings people together.
tech.author: Matt Mullenweg

tech.text: The science of today is the technology of tomorrow.
tech.author: Edward Teller

tech.text: The Internet is becoming the town square for the global village of tomorrow.
tech.author: Bill Gates

tech.text: Innovation distinguishes between a leader and a follower.
tech.author: Steve Jobs

tech.text: Technological progress is like an axe in the hands of a pathological criminal.
tech.author: Albert Einstein

tech.text: The art challenges the technology, and the technology inspires the art.
tech.author: John Lasseter

fun.text: Life is short. Smile while you still have teeth!
I told my computer I needed a break, and now it won’t stop sending me beach pictures!
I used to think I was indecisive, but now I'm not too sure.
I’m on a whiskey diet. I’ve lost three days already.
Why don’t scientists trust atoms? Because they make up everything!
Parallel lines have so much in common. It’s a shame they’ll never meet.

faith.text: Faith is taking the first step even when you don't see the whole staircase.
faith.author: Martin Luther King Jr.

faith.text: Faith is the bird that feels the light and sings when the dawn is still dark.
faith.author: Rabindranath Tagore

faith.text: To be a believer is to be a part of something larger than ourselves.
faith.author: Anonymous

faith.text: Everything that we see is a shadow cast by that which we do not see.
faith.author: Martin Luther King Jr.

faith.text: Faith sees the invisible, believes the unbelievable, and receives the impossible.
faith.author: Corrie Ten Boom

faith.text: Your faith can move mountains, but don’t be surprised if a few hills tumble down.
faith.author: Anonymous

wisdom.text: Do not dwell in the past, do not dream of the future, concentrate the mind on the present moment.
wisdom.author: Buddha

wisdom.text: The journey of a thousand miles begins with one step.
wisdom.author: Lao Tzu

wisdom.text: In the midst of movement and chaos, keep stillness inside of you.
wisdom.author: Deepak Chopra

wisdom.text: A wise man will make more opportunities than he finds.
wisdom.author: Francis Bacon

wisdom.text: It is not how old you are but how you are old.
wisdom.author: Jules Renard

wisdom.text: Wisdom is not a product of schooling but of the lifelong attempt to acquire it.
wisdom.author: Albert Einstein
